scripts.test:pr: yarn playwright install && E2E_TEST_SCOPE=@PR yarn playwright test --project chrome; EXIT_CODE=$?; allure generate -o ../../e2e-output --clean; tsx ./config/clean-attachments.config.ts; exit $EXIT_CODE
